MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-13-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF SHAWN HOLLE'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

Appearances:
Shawn Holle, in person, Plaintiff.
Karim Bhanji, Esq., by Zoom, (425) 281-6858, Withdrawing Attorney.
Amy Frenzen, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, by Zoom, (415) 554-4285, for the City and County of San Francisco, Defendant.

The instant motion is discussed. The court confirms with withdrawing counsel, Mr. Bhanji, that he is waving costs and fees incurred re this matter. The court grants the Motion to be Relieved as counsel. The court will sign an order on the Mandatory Judicial Council Form, MC-053.

Judge: John M. True (Visiting Judge). Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JMT)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Continued To Mar-13-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Prior to the hearing. Mr. Holle appeared in the courtroom and states he is contesting the matter and did not comply with the tentative ruling rule. Clerk informs party the hearing will be on 3/13 at 1pm in Dept. 302 and to follow procedure on contesting the matter and appearing before the court. Party is released after clerk gives a copy of the TR and state bar info. After the Mr. Holle left, Mr. Bhanji and Mr. Shapiro appear in an abundance of caution. Clerk informs them Mr. Hole is contesting and of the 3/13 at 1pm hrg. date.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SHAWN HOLLE's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

Continued to 3/13/26 at 1pm before Visiting Judge John True. Plaintiff contests the matter.

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (In-person) :
Diallah Bhanji, Esq. 425-281-6858Bhanji Law Firm for Plaintiff. (by Zoom)
Adam Shapiro, Esq. Amy Frenzen, Esq. 415-554-3885 Office of the City Attorney for Defendant.
Court reporter: Angela Pourtabib, CSR#13714, 415-601-7054, apourtabib@gmail.com, Reported.

ARGUED. Mr. Shapiro contets and presents arguments; waarant terminationg of sanctions, previous misconduct, harm occured, party has been threatened, assault occurred. The Court poses questions. Ms. Bhanji responds to arguments; presents timeline, client has right to bring harrassesers forward, PTSD triggered. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion for terminating sanctions against Plaintiff Shawn Holle.

The Court takes the matter under submission. The Court will prepare an order.

Visiting Judge: Cindee Mayfield, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Angela Pourtabib, CSR#13714, 415-601-7054, apourtabib@gmail.com, Reported. (302/CM)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Diallah Bhanji
Off Calendar Dec-08-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SHAWN HOLLE's Motion For Protective Order.

Plaintiff's motion for protective order is granted in part. Defendant may conduct an additional deposition of plaintiff not to exceed two hours. Plaintiff has already appeared for deposition and this court's summary judgment/adjudication ruling has narrowed the issues in this case. Mr. Ochi shall not appear at the deposition. Plaintiff's request for a discovery referee is denied. The parties and counsel are advised to behave professionally at the deposition. Recalcitrant conduct may lead to sanctions and/or a further deposition. Sanctions denied.

Order is signed.

Visiting Judge: Cindee Mayfield, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CM)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-30-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Diallah Bhanji, Esq. 425-281-6858 Bhanji Law Firm for Plaintiff. (via Zoom)
Adam Shapiro, Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-4285 Office of the City Attorney for Defendants CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, EDWARD OCHI.

ARGUED. Mr. Shapiro sent a timely notice to contest and contests the portion of the tentative order denying summary adjudication as to Plaintiff's claim for FEHA retaliation (Cause of action no. 6). Mr. Shapiro cites portions on MPA.

Ms. Bhanji sent a timely notice to contest and presents argument on the causes of action 1) disability discrimination, 2) failure to accomodate 3) failure to engage 4) disability harassment 5) failure to prevent discrimination and harassment; cites portions on separate statment.

After full argument, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTs CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, and EDWARD OCHI's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication.

Defendants City and County of San Francisco and Edward Ochi's motion for summary judgment and/or their alternative motion for summary adjudication is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
